heading: 会计师和审计师薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 会计师和审计师薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥6,000–10,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。会计师和审计师 当前可见参考为 约 ¥6,000–10,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: 仅采到一个可见样本数的职业级/相邻岗位页面，尚未补 BOSS、猎聘或智联岗位片段。
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $81,680，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: OOH 10th/90th percentile evidence was captured where visible; p25/p75 still require OEWS or CareerOneStop extraction.
p25/p75 are left null pending a systematic BLS OEWS/CareerOneStop percentile pipeline.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £25,000，experienced 为 £60,000。
limitations: Auditor profile also exists but salary not captured in this pass.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: Do not present this as a unified EU occupation salary; use only as regional/macro boundary unless occupation-level EU data is later captured.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 会计师和审计师 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 会计师和审计师，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.

sources.name: 职友集/JobUI
sources.used_for: CN evidence cn_001: 中级会计师页列出：55.5%岗位拿￥6-10K/月；1-3年工资￥7.5K；近一年200份样本。

eu_context_boundary.body: The EU section is macro context only and must not be read as a unified European occupation salary.

City, employer type, organization size, and budget source can materially change offers.

Relevant licenses, equipment, software, compliance, or client responsibility can change compensation.
Shift work, field work, seasonal pressure, risk, and delivery demands can affect bonuses or upper ranges.

reader_guidance: First confirm whether the source is the exact Accountants and auditors role or an audited adjacent role cluster.

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考

summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥7,245–20,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。航空公司飞行员、副驾驶与飞行工程师 当前可见参考为 约 ¥7,245–20,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: 飞行员收入由基本工资、小时费、津贴和等级构成；招聘说明和平台平均数不能直接合成为固定月薪。
机长、高级教员和外籍机长薪资未纳入普通副驾驶/飞行学员证据。
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $226,600，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: p10/p90 were not captured from a dedicated OEWS or CareerOneStop percentile table in this repaired ledger.

summary.headline: Sales Representatives, Wholesale And Manufacturing, Except Technical And Scientific Products salary reference
summary.short_answer: China is shown only as a recruitment-market signal (about ¥4,500–10,000 per month), while US, UK, and EU references must be read within their source boundaries.

china_recruitment_reference.heading: China recruitment-market reference
china_recruitment_reference.body: The China section uses passed recruitment-market evidence only. The current bounded reference for Sales Representatives, Wholesale And Manufacturing, Except Technical And Scientific Products is about ¥4,500–10,000 per month; it is not an official occupation wage or personal salary prediction.
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.

limitations: China figures are recruitment-market references only, not official occupation wages.

china_official_context.body: This asset does not use an official Chinese single-occupation median wage; official industry or unit statistics are macro context only.

uk_reference.body: The UK section uses a National Careers or audited adjacent profile. Starter is £23,000; experienced is £50,000.
limitations: Generic sales representative; not specifically wholesale/manufacturing.

heading: 厨师与厨师长薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 厨师与厨师长薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥4,500–8,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。厨师与厨师长 当前可见参考为 约 ¥4,500–8,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: 厨师薪资受菜系、酒店/餐厅等级、包吃住、加班和岗位层级影响；不可直接合并厨师和厨师长。
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $60,990，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: OOH 10th/90th percentile evidence was captured where visible; p25/p75 still require OEWS or CareerOneStop extraction.
p25/p75 are left null pending a systematic BLS OEWS/CareerOneStop percentile pipeline.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £22,000，experienced 为 £40,000。

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: Do not present this as a unified EU occupation salary; use only as regional/macro boundary unless occupation-level EU data is later captured.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 厨师与厨师长 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 厨师与厨师长，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.

heading: 飞机与航空电子设备维修技师薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 飞机与航空电子设备维修技师薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥6,800–20,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。飞机与航空电子设备维修技师 当前可见参考为 约 ¥6,800–20,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: 复用已通过样本 aircraft-mechanics-and-service-technicians 的证据作为相邻岗位候选；该证据不是 飞机与航空电子设备维修技师 的 exact title 样本。
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $78,680，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: p25 is null because the v2 official reference did not contain a captured p25 value; use BLS OEWS or CareerOneStop in a later percentile pipeline.
p75 is null because the v2 official reference did not contain a captured p75 value; use BLS OEWS or CareerOneStop in a later percentile pipeline.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £26,000，experienced 为 £45,000。
limitations: UK reference is direct or adjacent to the occupation and is not converted into China salary or treated as EU-wide occupation pay.
UK reference is an adjacent National Careers profile and must not be presented as a fixed occupation equivalence.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: Do not present this as a unified EU occupation salary; use only as regional/macro boundary unless occupation-level EU data is later captured.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 飞机与航空电子设备维修技师 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 飞机与航空电子设备维修技师，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。

美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。

Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.

heading: 汽车维修技师与机械师薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 汽车维修技师与机械师薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥2,000–20,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。汽车维修技师与机械师 当前可见参考为 约 ¥2,000–20,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official occupational wage.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $49,670，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: My Next Move page provides median and 10th/90th markers in the captured summary; p25/p75 and annual openings were not captured from this source.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £24,000，experienced 为 £38,000。
limitations: Adjacent UK profile boundary: selected 'Agricultural engineering technician' because a direct 'Automotive Service Technicians And Mechanics' profile was not automatically captured.
UK reference is an adjacent National Careers profile and must not be presented as a fixed occupation equivalence.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 汽车维修技师与机械师 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 汽车维修技师与机械师，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.

sources.name: JobUI

sources.name: JobUI
sources.used_for: CN evidence cn_002: 汽车维修工就业前景怎么样？汽车维修工招聘一个月多少钱：57.4%的岗位拿4.5-8K，取自1420份样本。 可见折算月薪区间：2000-20000元/月。

heading: 理发师薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 理发师薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥4,500–8,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。理发师 当前可见参考为 约 ¥4,500–8,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official occupational wage.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $38,960，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: My Next Move page provides median and 10th/90th markers in the captured summary; p25/p75 and annual openings were not captured from this source.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £19,000，experienced 为 £30,000。
limitations: Direct-first search boundary: a direct 'Barbers' profile was not captured; selected adjacent UK profile 'Hairdresser' and no fixed equivalence is inferred.
UK reference is an adjacent National Careers profile and must not be presented as a fixed occupation equivalence.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 理发师 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 理发师，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。账单与账款催收员 当前可见参考为 约 ¥6,000–15,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official occupational wage.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $46,040，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: My Next Move page provides median and 10th/90th markers in the captured summary; p25/p75 and annual openings were not captured from this source.

城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。生物信息技术员 当前可见参考为 约 ¥10,000–20,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official occupational wage.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 $71,490，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: My Next Move page provides median and 10th/90th markers in the captured summary; p25/p75 and annual openings were not captured from this source.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £24,000，experienced 为 £31,000。
limitations: Direct-first search boundary: a direct 'Bioinformatics Technicians' profile was not captured; selected adjacent UK profile 'Laboratory technician' and no fixed equivalence is inferred.
UK reference is an adjacent National Careers profile and must not be presented as a fixed occupation equivalence.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 生物信息技术员 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 生物信息技术员，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。

heading: 心血管/心电/超声技术员薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 心血管/心电/超声技术员薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥3,000–8,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。心血管/心电/超声技术员 当前可见参考为 约 ¥3,000–8,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official single-occupation wage or personal salary prediction.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 not captured，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: Official profile URL captured; numeric US wage fields remain null unless directly extracted by a downstream official-source parser.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £40,000，experienced 为 £65,000。

facts.working_pattern: evenings / weekends / bank holidays on a rota

limitations: Direct-first search boundary: a direct 'Cardiovascular technologists and technicians' profile was not captured; selected adjacent sonographer/clinical diagnostic profile and no fixed equivalence is inferred.
UK reference is an adjacent National Careers profile and must not be presented as a fixed occupation equivalence.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 心血管/心电/超声技术员 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 心血管/心电/超声技术员，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.

sources.name: JobUI
sources.used_for: CN evidence cn_001: 职友集超声技师页显示：超声技师招聘一个月多少钱：51.5%的岗位拿3-6K，取自70份样本。（审计数值锚点：3000-6000元/月，来自上述可见薪资片段折算或记录。）

sources.name: BOSS Zhipin
sources.used_for: CN evidence cn_002: BOSS直聘心电图技师搜索页可见岗位片段：心电图技师3-4K、4-8K、4-6K、3-5K等。（审计数值锚点：3000-8000元/月，来自上述可见薪资片段折算或记录。）

summary.headline: 高职/高校职业技术教育教师薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥6,000–15,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。高职/高校职业技术教育教师 当前可见参考为 约 ¥6,000–15,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official single-occupation wage or personal salary prediction.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 not captured，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: Official profile URL captured; numeric US wage fields remain null unless directly extracted by a downstream official-source parser.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £37,000，experienced 为 £65,000。
limitations: Direct-first search boundary: a direct postsecondary CTE teacher profile was not captured; selected higher education lecturer as UK postsecondary teaching boundary.
UK reference is an adjacent National Careers profile and must not be presented as a fixed occupation equivalence.

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 高职/高校职业技术教育教师 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 高职/高校职业技术教育教师，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。

heading: 儿童、家庭与学校社会工作者薪资与就业参考

summary.headline: 儿童、家庭与学校社会工作者薪资参考
summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥4,500–43,200/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。儿童、家庭与学校社会工作者 当前可见参考为 约 ¥4,500–43,200/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official single-occupation wage or personal salary prediction.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 not captured，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: Official source URL captured; wage values remain null unless directly extracted by the downstream official-source parser.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £32,000，experienced 为 £48,000。

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 儿童、家庭与学校社会工作者 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 儿童、家庭与学校社会工作者，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.

sources.name: JobUI
sources.used_for: CN evidence cn_001: 职友集社会工作专业就业报告显示：最多岗位拿4.5-8K，占47.1%；岗位包括社工、社会工作者、项目社工。（审计数值锚点：4500-8000元/月，来自上述可见薪资片段折算或记录。）

sources.name: 104 Career Taiwan
sources.used_for: CN evidence cn_002: 104职涯导航社会工作与儿童少年福利学系薪资片段列出社工P25 51.3万、P50 56.9万、P75 62.2万新台币年薪，仅作为中文市场相邻参考。（审计数值锚点：35600-43200元/月，来自上述可见薪资片段折算或记录。）

summary.short_answer: 中国大陆使用招聘市场可见证据，参考区间为 约 ¥2,000–20,000/月；美国、英国和欧盟仅按各自来源边界阅读。

china_recruitment_reference.heading: 中国招聘市场参考
china_recruitment_reference.body: 中国大陆部分只使用已通过审计的招聘市场证据。商业飞行员 当前可见参考为 约 ¥2,000–20,000/月，不是官方职业中位薪资，也不是个人收入预测。
china_recruitment_reference.data_boundary: This is a China recruitment-market reference derived from platform samples, posting snippets, salary pages, or adjacent-role evidence; it is not an official Chinese single-occupation median wage.
china_recruitment_reference.confidence_reason: China evidence uses source-captured recruitment-market signals; adjacent rows remain bounded and must not be read as official wage data.
limitations: China evidence is recruitment-market reference only, not official single-occupation wage or personal salary prediction.
China recruitment estimates are platform, posting, or salary-report signals only; they are not official Chinese single-occupation wages and not personal salary predictions.
Some China evidence uses Liepin salary-report snippets or search-visible salary text; treat these as recruitment-market references with source-boundary limits.

china_official_context.heading: 中国官方工资语境
china_official_context.body: 中国大陆没有在本资产中使用官方单职业中位薪资；官方行业或单位数据只能作为宏观语境。

us_official_reference.heading: 美国官方参考
us_official_reference.body: 美国部分使用官方或公共职业来源；当前 median annual 为 not captured，p25/p75 缺失时保持为空。
limitations: Official source URL captured; wage values remain null unless directly extracted by the downstream official-source parser.
p25 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p25 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.
p75 is not filled because the passed evidence ledger did not capture an official p75 value from OEWS or CareerOneStop.

uk_reference.heading: 英国参考
uk_reference.body: 英国部分使用 UK National Careers 或有边界的相邻 profile；starter 为 £24,000，experienced 为 £110,000。

facts.working_pattern: nights / weekends / bank holidays away from home

eu_context_boundary.heading: 欧盟语境边界
eu_context_boundary.body: 欧盟部分只作为宏观语境边界，不写成统一欧洲职业薪资。
limitations: EU context is macro-only; no EU-wide occupational median salary is inferred.
EU evidence is macro/regional context only and must not be presented as an EU occupation-specific salary.

salary_drivers.description: 商业飞行员 的薪资会随具体岗位标题、职责范围和相邻岗位口径变化。
城市、机构类型、企业规模和预算来源会明显影响招聘报价。
初级、独立承担、带团队或负责关键结果时，薪资区间通常不同。
岗位相关证书、设备、软件、合规或客户责任会改变岗位定价。
排班、现场工作、旺季、风险和交付压力会影响补贴、奖金或上限。

reader_guidance: 先确认你看的是否真的是 商业飞行员，还是相邻岗位或更宽岗位簇。
中国薪资只读作招聘市场样本信号，不读作官方全国职业工资。
美国、英国和欧盟来源各有统计口径，不能直接互相换算。
比较 offer 时同时看城市、经验、雇主类型、排班和职责边界。
forbidden_claims: Do not describe China recruitment samples as official occupation wages.
Do not convert US, UK, or EU references into a personal China salary.
Do not promise employment, raises, visas, certification, promotion, or career outcomes.
